Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to construct an accepting Petri net for the described insurance claim management process We will use pm4py constructs

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says The initial marking should place a token in a start place representing a new claim arriving So we have a start place source Then there is an activity Insurance Claim Actually the description A customer files an Insurance Claim C after which the following steps take place So the filing of the claim is not part of the numbered steps it is like the trigger

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we can have a start place then a transition representing the filing Or we could have a start place and then directly go to Claim Registration Usually in Petri nets we model activities as transitions So we have activities CR DV FC CA AP P N CL Also additional activities RDS and II

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says transitions labeled with the activity names So we should label with the activity names Claim Registration Document Verification and so on We will not include Insurance Claim as a transition start place represents claim filed

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets design step by step We have main flow Start to CR to DV to FC to CA to AP to P to N to CL to End

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After DV if documents incomplete we do RDS and then presumably go back to DV again In real process after re submission you need to verify again So I interpret that RDS leads back to DV for re verification

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Similarly after Fraud Check if doubts we do II and then likely go back to FC That allows multiple cycles FC to II to FC until no doubts then proceed to CA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Approval is conditional only if the amount surpasses a threshold So after CA there should be one path with Approval and another path that skips Approval before Payment

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The simplest is after CA there is a place From that place two transitions one labeled Approval and one silent transition that leads directly to the place before Payment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will model the DV decision with a loop DV to place after DV then either forward toward FC or through RDS back to the place before DV

Name: Validation - PE
Text: That creates a proper loop DV consumes token from the place before it produces token after DV then if incomplete RDS consumes from after DV and produces back to the place enabling DV again

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For FC we need a place before FC and a place after FC Then after FC there is a decision one transition to Claim Assessment and one transition to In depth Investigation which returns to the place before FC

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Using the same place after DV as the place returned to by II would also enable Re Document Submission after II which is not intended So we should separate the place after DV from the dedicated place before FC

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We can add a silent transition from the place after DV to the place before FC This cleanly separates the complete documents path from the RDS loop

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets define places start after CR after DV before FC after FC after CA before P after P after N end

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Transitions will be Claim Registration Document Verification silent complete path Re Document Submission Fraud Check In depth Investigation Claim Assessment Approval silent skip Payment Notification Closure

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Arcs start to CR CR to after CR after CR to DV DV to after DV after DV to silent complete to before FC after DV to RDS to after CR before FC to FC to after FC after FC to CA to after CA after FC to II to before FC after CA to AP to before P after CA to skip to before P before P to Payment to after P after P to Notification to after N after N to Closure to end

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Initial marking im has one token in start Final marking fm has one token in end

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Simulating the flow shows the loops work After RDS the token returns to the place before DV so DV must happen again After II the token returns to the place before FC so FC must happen again After CA either Approval or skip leads to Payment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The net is therefore a sound accepting Petri net for the described process and the final code defines all places transitions arcs and markings
